THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBBER, CATHERINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1770 BROADWAY #401, STAYED UNTIL MAR-21-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT & DAMAGES WAIVED. PLTF TO KEEP $510 SEC DEP. IF DEFT VACATES BY 3-21-95, PLTF WILL SET ASIDE JDMT & DISMISS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: ROSSOFF, MICHAEL SHERWOOD ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR KOPPL, BETTY
